stemHtml: When taking-off behind a heavy aircraft, with the wind coming from the right side, you adopt, whenever possible…

options.a: a different flight path from the preceding aircraft, by remaining to the right of and above its path.
options.b: a different flight path from the preceding aircraft, by remaining behind it and under its path.
options.c: an identical flight path to the one of the preceding aircraft.
options.d: a different flight path from the preceding aircraft, by remaining to the left of and under its path.
